purpose: All Pydantic v2 models. Single source of truth. model_config = ConfigDict(frozen=True) on all.

IntakeResult.docstring: Structured metadata extracted from raw user input in pipeline stage 1.

fields.name: actor
fields.note: Role, never a person name

fields.name: supporting_actors
fields.note: External systems or roles this use case calls

fields.name: system_boundary
fields.note: Service/component that owns this use case

StakeholderEntry.docstring: A stakeholder and their interest in this use case outcome.

fields.name: interest
fields.note: One sentence: what this stakeholder needs from this use case

ScaleHints.docstring: Frequency and scale signals that inform database and architecture selection.

NormalCourseStep.docstring: A single step in the use case Normal Course of Events.

fields.name: actor
fields.note: Actor name or 'System'

fields.name: action
fields.note: Present tense, single action, no UI language

fields.name: system_response
fields.note: What system does in response. '—' if step is actor-only.

AlternativeCourse.docstring: An alternative path branching from a specific normal course step.

InfoRequirement.docstring: Data element required at a specific step.

fields.name: source
fields.note: Likely table or service

NFREntry.docstring: Non-functional requirement specific to this use case.

StateMachineState.docstring: A state in an entity's lifecycle state machine.

SectionsResult.docstring: Use case body sections generated in pipeline stage 2.

fields.name: preconditions
fields.note: 3-6 verifiable states, noun phrases

fields.name: minimal_guarantee
fields.note: Cockburn: what system promises even on failure

fields.name: success_guarantee
fields.note: Cockburn: what is true for all stakeholders after success

fields.name: normal_course
fields.note: 5-9 steps

fields.name: alternative_courses
fields.note: Min 2

fields.name: postconditions
fields.note: 3-5 verifiable outcomes

fields.name: state_machine
fields.note: Only when primary entity has lifecycle states

fields.name: open_issues
fields.note: Cockburn open issues — questions for stakeholders

fields.name: name
fields.note: snake_case

fields.name: name
fields.note: PascalCase

UseCaseDocument.docstring: Complete output of generation pipeline. Returned by generator.generate().

fields.name: raw_markdown
fields.note: Final assembled doc including YAML frontmatter

fields.name: generated_at
fields.note: UTC

project_models.note: Models for ucgen.yaml project discovery file. Requires PyYAML optional dep.

fields.name: id
fields.note: User-defined e.g. UC-001

fields.name: actor
fields.note: Must match a name in project.actors

fields.name: on_generate
fields.note: Shell command after each use case. {uc_id}, {file} available.

fields.name: on_batch_complete
fields.note: Shell command after all. {count}, {project} available.
